_comment: Golden cases for the EVIDENCE workflow (security -> validator -> finalize). Each prompt is the EvidenceInput JSON as text; the security_node parses it. Grade with: agents-cli eval grade --metrics evidence_quality. Requires root_agent = evidence_workflow when generating.
